title: crassocephalum subscandens
intro: Crassocephalum subscandens, also known as West African lettuce, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crassocephalum subscandens include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat various health conditions.
